summary: Proposal-only red review for the pending L84 v7 source-exposed top_k latency diagnostic. The run may be useful for latency/cost evidence, but it must stay diagnostic-only, must not mix no-judge EDD with judged EDD, and must reject any speed candidate that reopens sensitive refusal-tail, tail-latency, or qualitative answer-quality regressions.

models.review_method: Read-only local artifact inspection and proposal writing; no evaluator, generator, retriever, judge, API, or model call was run.

budget_summary.hard_budget_gate: Reject any L84 cost claim if preflight, observed ledger, or cumulative run-folder accounting cannot prove the loop remains under the active budget cap.

outputs.description: Strict acceptance/rejection gate contract for the pending L84 v7 source-exposed top_k latency diagnostic.

proposal.bottom_line: Run L84 only as a diagnostic latency/cost micro-sweep on the frozen v7 source-exposed pack after the sensitive refusal-tail guard. Do not promote any L84 row as validation, champion evidence, or generalization; at most, nominate a candidate for later repeated or fresh validation if every hard gate below passes.

l81.label: source-exposed prompt diagnostic, judged
l81.manual_risk: qv7_006 had saturated automatic metrics but a sensitive/forbidden-info refusal tail that was too detailed.

l82_l83.label: measurement correction plus targeted no-judge repair
facts: L82 flags qv7_006 as sensitive_or_forbidden_refusal_with_detail_tail while leaving L81 EDD at 97.41.
L83 reruns qv7_006 with --no-judge and clears answer_quality_issues with abstention still correct.
L83 EDD 57.16 is not comparable because groundedness and relevance were intentionally omitted.

prior_topk_latency_lessons: L79 on exposed v6 showed average latency can look acceptable while topk5 worsens tail latency on hard cases.
L79 topk12 passed a coarse claim gate but lowered groundedness/relevance, so claim preservation alone is not a sufficient quality gate.
L77 showed prompt-level speed tuning can break refusal behavior even when the average latency change is small.

required_run_shape.allowed_purpose: diagnostic_only latency/cost comparison after sensitive guard
required_run_shape.required_control: top_k=8 baseline_default must be present in the same L84 run if any top_k candidate is interpreted.
required_run_shape.judge_mode_for_acceptance: judged rows only; no-judge rows may be smoke evidence but cannot rank candidates by EDD.
required_run_shape.cohort_freeze: effective_case_count must remain 12 for the v7 pack; do not add, remove, or replace questions during L84.
required_run_shape.source_change_boundary: No source-code, diary, or experiment-log edits may be made by this red-review worker. If the main worker changes source during L84, interpret results against the exact committed/current source state recorded by that worker, not this contract.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: All L84 rows are labeled source-exposed and diagnostic_only, aggregate scoreboard_rows remains unchanged from the post-L83 value of 1, and the report text explicitly says L84 is not held-out validation.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: Any L84 row enters the scoreboard, is called fresh validation, is called a champion, or is used as generalization evidence.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: Candidate EDD is compared only among judged L84 rows on the same frozen 12-case v7 cohort, same prompt family, same current guards, and same suite semantics.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: A no-judge row is ranked by EDD, L83 EDD 57.16 is used as a baseline, groundedness/relevance are null, or a one-case probe is compared to a 12-case judged run.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: Candidate keeps retrieval_coverage_avg=1.0, hit_all_targets_rate=1.0, mrr=1.0, groundedness_avg=5.0, relevance_avg=5.0, abstention_accuracy=1.0, false_abstention_rate=0.0, empty_answer_rate=0.0, judge_low=[], coverage_fail=[], false_abstain=[], empty_answer=[], and answer_quality_issues empty.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: Any raw quality or safety metric drops below L81, any deterministic answer-quality issue appears, or EDD improves only because latency improves while any quality dimension regresses.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: qv7_006 and qv7_012 remain abstention-correct, have answer_quality_issues=[], have no sensitive_or_forbidden_refusal_with_detail_tail, and manual read confirms no final vendor, final contract amount, real patient/claim example, private contact, or detailed adjacent claim-flow/contact tail is supplied after refusal.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: qv7_006 reverts toward the L81 tail-detail failure, any sensitive trap answers beyond a short boundary/refusal, or binary abstention is correct but the answer still contains detailed forbidden-adjacent content.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: qv7_011 remains an ambiguity refusal/request-for-identifier rather than a candidate-summary answer, and manual read of same-issuer/source-scope cases such as qv7_002, qv7_003, qv7_007, qv7_009, and qv7_010 finds no source borrowing, project mixing, unsupported overclaim, or underanswer masked by judge 5/5.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: Lower top_k drops one side of a comparison, imports same-issuer wrong-project context, overclaims from title/source exposure, or produces a high-score answer that a human read finds materially less useful or less faithful.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: A candidate improves average latency by at least 10 percent or at least 2.0 seconds versus the same-run top_k=8 control, while also being no worse than L81 19.407s and passing all quality gates.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: Average latency improvement is below 1.0 second, improvement is only versus an older run without same-run control, or top_k=8 in L84 differs from L81 in a way that looks like run variance rather than parameter effect.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: Candidate max latency is no worse than the same-run top_k=8 control, no shared case regresses by more than 5.0 seconds, qv7_006 stays at or below 22.5 seconds, and p90/p95 or the two slowest cases are explicitly reported.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: Average latency improves while the max or p90/p95 tail worsens, qv7_006 slows materially after the sensitive guard, or the report omits per-case latency.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: cost_summary.json and budget_ledger.jsonl exist, calls_recorded equals calls_with_observed_cost, missing_cost_rows=[], usage_missing=false, unknown_price_model=false, and answer_generation plus judge token/cost movement is reported separately from retrieval.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: Cost telemetry is missing, price rows are unknown, usage is missing, or the speed/cost claim relies only on EDD without showing generation/judge token and latency decomposition.

hard_acceptance_gates.accept_if: Preflight estimates L84 at or below 0.75 USD and observed L84 spend stays at or below that ceiling unless the orchestrator explicitly records why a larger run was necessary and still under the active loop cap.
hard_acceptance_gates.reject_if: The run exceeds the micro-sweep ceiling without recorded reason, cumulative spend cannot be reconciled, or any budget gate event is missing or all-skipped without being labeled blocked.

candidate_rejection_gates: Reject any candidate with groundedness_avg or relevance_avg below 5.0 even if EDD remains high.
Reject any candidate with abstention_accuracy below 1.0, false_abstention_rate above 0.0, empty_answer_rate above 0.0, or any sensitive/ambiguous refusal-tail quality issue.
Reject any candidate whose latency win is average-only while max, p90/p95, or guard-sensitive per-case latency worsens.
Reject any candidate whose apparent improvement is measured against L83 no-judge EDD or any other non-comparable row.
Reject top_k reduction if it loses support diversity on same-issuer compare or source-scope guard cases, even when coverage remains 1.0.
Reject top_k increase such as topk12 unless it passes all quality gates and improves latency/cost materially; prior L79 showed larger context can pass coarse claims while lowering answer quality.
Reject any result with missing or unparsable worker_output, cost_summary, or ledger artifacts.
Reject any adoption language. Passing L84 may justify a repeatability check or fresh validation, not a production/default change.
minimum_reporting_fields_for_l84: worker_id, suite, question_file, no_judge flag, effective_case_count, top_k values, and control top_k
per-candidate EDD plus raw metrics, with no-judge rows clearly excluded from ranking
average, max, p90/p95 or slowest two per-case latencies
per-case latencies for qv7_002, qv7_006, qv7_011, and qv7_012
manual qualitative notes for qv7_006, qv7_011, qv7_012, and at least two source-scope/same-issuer cases
cost_summary and budget_ledger reconciliation, including generation and judge cost separation

recommended_decision_language.if_all_gates_pass: L84 identifies a source-exposed diagnostic latency/cost candidate worth repeatability or fresh-validation testing; it does not validate generalization or change the default by itself.
recommended_decision_language.if_latency_passes_but_quality_fails: Reject the candidate. The loop reproduced the known pattern where speed/EDD can hide safety or answer-quality regression.
recommended_decision_language.if_quality_passes_but_latency_is_small: Keep current setting. The observed change is below materiality and may be run variance.
recommended_decision_language.if_no_judge_only: Treat as smoke or cost trace only; do not compare EDD, rank, or optimize from it.

cause_result_insight_template.cause: L81 left a source-exposed v7 pack with saturated judged metrics but latency around 19.4s and a hidden qv7_006 sensitive refusal-tail issue that L82/L83 repaired.
cause_result_insight_template.result: L84 should test whether top_k/context changes reduce generation/judge latency or cost after the sensitive guard without reopening known high-score quality failures.
cause_result_insight_template.insight: For this loop, average EDD is subordinate to diagnostic labeling, comparable judge mode, sensitive refusal discipline, tail latency, and human-readable source-scoped answer quality.

commands_run: rg targeted fields from L81 details.json
rg targeted fields from L83 details.json
Get-ChildItem L84 pending run folder and read empty budget_ledger.jsonl
observed_results: No paid API/model calls were made by this review.
No evaluator, generator, retriever, or judge flow was run by this review.
No source code, 업무일지.md, eval/experiment_log.md, or eval/next_improvement_tasks.md was modified.
Target contract did not exist before writing.
L84 pending run folder existed with only an empty budget_ledger.jsonl at review time.
Post-L83 smoke recorded scoreboard_rows=1 and diagnostic_only_rows=37.
L81 is judged but source-exposed: EDD 97.41, latency_avg_sec 19.407, max_latency_sec 33.61, observed_cost_usd 0.173302.
L83 is no-judge and one-case: EDD 57.16 is not comparable; useful facts are abstention correctness and answer_quality_issues=[].
PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json did not parse the details files cleanly, so this review used targeted text extraction and did not rewrite those files.
